characters.appearance: Young adult female with short, side-parted dark brown hair. Fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and symmetrical features.
characters.wardrobe: Light grey button-down shirt. Large black over-ear headphones in the first half.
characters.demeanor: Friendly and informative, but slightly stiff.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या आपको भी लगता है कि आपकी English की वजह से आप career में पीछे छूट रहे हैं? [Do you also feel you are being left behind in your career because of your English?]
Character A says: Supernova एक ऐसा app है जहाँ आप AI tutor के साथ रोज़ English बोलने की practice कर सकते हैं और instant feedback पा सकते हैं। [Supernova is an app where you can practice speaking English daily with an AI tutor and get instant feedback.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common insecurity among Indian professionals regarding their English fluency.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution, highlighting the AI tutor feature for daily practice.
- Sets a warm, encouraging, and relatable tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
क्या English की वजह से
पीछे छूट रहे हैं?
Supernova App
AI tutor के साथ
रोज़ practice करें
Instant Feedback

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I am... working here. [I am... working here.]
Character A says: Oops, AI tutor ने बताया कि मुझे 'I have been working here' बोलना चाहिए। [Oops, the AI tutor told me I should say 'I have been working here'.]
Character A says: I have been working here. [I have been working here.]
Character A says: Perfect! यह बहुत आसान है। [Perfect! It's very easy.]
Character A says: आज ही अपने phone में Supernova download करें। [Download Supernova on your phone today.]
Character A says: रोज़ practice करें और पूरे confidence के साथ English बोलें। [Practice daily and speak English with full confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a real-world speaking scenario (office introduction) and immediate AI grammar correction.
- Shows the user successfully correcting their mistake, emphasizing ease of use.
- Delivers a clear call-to-action to download the app and build confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
I am... working here.
AI Feedback:
Say "I have been..."
I have been working here.
Perfect!
Download Supernova
Speak with confidence

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the final brand logo and app store badges.
- Reinforces the core value proposition of speaking English confidently.
- Removes competitor-specific pricing and hype claims.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speak English Confidently
Supernova
Download Now
